parameters.prompt:
=# Text Analysis Task

Analyze the following Arabic text and provide:
1. Sentiment (very_negative, negative, neutral, positive, very_positive)
2. Sentiment score (-1 to 1)
3. Keywords (most important words)
4. Main topics/themes
5. Emotions (joy, sadness, anger, fear, surprise, trust as percentages)
6. Brief summary
7. Action items if any

## Text to Analyze:
{{$json.body.textData.join('\n\n---\n\n')}}

## Response Format (JSON):
{
  "sentiment": "positive",
  "sentimentScore": 0.75,
  "confidence": 0.92,
  "keywords": ["word1", "word2"],
  "entities": ["entity1", "entity2"],
  "themes": [
    {
      "name": "theme name",
      "relevance": 0.9,
      "keywords": ["kw1", "kw2"]
    }
  ],
  "emotions": {
    "joy": 0.8,
    "sadness": 0.1,
    "anger": 0.0,
    "fear": 0.05,
    "surprise": 0.3,
    "trust": 0.7
  },
  "summary": "Brief summary here",
  "actionItems": ["action1", "action2"]
}

Provide ONLY the JSON response, no additional text.

=# Topic Extraction Task

Extract main topics and themes from the following survey responses in Arabic.
For each topic provide:
- Topic name (in Arabic)
- Keywords related to the topic
- Relevance score (0-1)
- Overall sentiment about this topic

## Survey Responses:
{{$json.body.surveyData.responses.map(r => r.textValue || JSON.stringify(r)).join('\n\n---\n\n')}}

## Response Format (JSON):
{
  "topics": [
    {
      "name": "اسم الموضوع",
      "keywords": ["كلمة1", "كلمة2"],
      "relevance": 0.92,
      "sentiment": "positive"
    }
  ],
  "insights": [
    "Insight 1 in Arabic or English",
    "Insight 2"
  ]
}

Provide ONLY the JSON response.

=# Comprehensive Project Analysis

Perform a complete analysis of this social impact project:

## Project Details:
{{JSON.stringify($json.body.projectInfo, null, 2)}}

## All Survey Data:
{{JSON.stringify($json.body.surveyData, null, 2)}}

## Current Indicators:
{{JSON.stringify($json.body.indicators, null, 2)}}

Provide:
1. Overall sentiment analysis
2. Main topics and themes discovered
3. Impact evaluation summary
4. Achievement of goals and targets
5. Comprehensive recommendations for improvement
6. Key insights and learnings
7. Success factors
8. Areas for improvement

## Response Format (JSON):
{
  "textAnalysis": {
    "sentiment": "positive",
    "sentimentScore": 0.82,
    "confidence": 0.91,
    "keywords": [],
    "summary": "Overall project summary..."
  },
  "topics": [...],
  "impactEvaluation": {
    "overallImpact": 91,
    "achievements": [],
    "analysis": "Comprehensive analysis..."
  },
  "recommendations": [],
  "insights": [],
  "successFactors": [],
  "areasForImprovement": []
}

Provide ONLY the JSON response.
